# @vanduo-oss/hex-grid v1.1.0 — LLM Context

You are an expert on **@vanduo-oss/hex-grid**, the **standalone canvas hex-grid**
package of the Vanduo design system: the `VdHexGrid` class (pan/zoom/selection,
terrain, BFS pathfinding, custom render hooks) plus an optional pure-function
`hex-math` module for axial geometry.

It ships three ways:

- **ESM/CJS core** — `import { VdHexGrid } from '@vanduo-oss/hex-grid'`.
- **hex-math utilities** — `@vanduo-oss/hex-grid/hex-math` (pure functions + terrain constants).
- **Vue 3** — optional `@vanduo-oss/hex-grid/vue` (`vue` is an *optional* peer).

---

## Core Principles
- **Framework-agnostic core**: the grid is a plain class over a `<canvas>`; Vue is an opt-in subpath.
- **Axial coordinates**: hexes are addressed by `(q, r)`.
- **Lifecycle hygiene**: call `destroy()` before discarding an instance (disconnects theme observers).
- **Token-driven theming**: reads Vanduo `--vd-*` custom properties, re-themes on `data-theme` and `prefers-color-scheme` changes.

---

## Install
```bash
pnpm add @vanduo-oss/hex-grid
# Vue users also need `vue` (>=3.3).
```

## Exports
| Export | Path | Contents |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `.` | `dist/index.js` + `dist/index.cjs` | `VdHexGrid` class, `VD_HEX_VERSION` |
| `./hex-math` | `dist/hex-math.js` | pure axial-geometry helpers + terrain constants |
| `./vue` | `dist/vue.js` (+ `dist/vue.d.ts`) | `VdHexGrid` Vue 3 component |

> Note: the `.` and `./hex-math` entries currently ship **without** `.d.ts`; the `./vue` subpath **is** typed.

## Core usage (JS)
```js
import { VdHexGrid } from '@vanduo-oss/hex-grid';

const grid = new VdHexGrid({ element, size: 30, width: 15, height: 10, rotation: 0 });
grid.on('select', (hex) => { /* … */ });
```
Constructor options: `element` (required), `canvas` (auto-created), `size` (30),
`width` (10), `height` (10), `rotation` (0).

Key methods: `on(event, cb)` (`select`/`zoom`/`pan`), `setSize`, `setDimensions`,
`setRotation`, `reset`, `resetView`, `zoomIn`/`zoomOut`, `fillRandom`, `getHex`,
`getAllHexes`, `setHexFill`, `setHexTerrain`/`getHexTerrain`, `generateRandomTerrain`,
`getValidMoves`, `getPath` (BFS), `hexDistance`, `set/get/clearHexData`,
`export/importTerrainData`, `setCustomRender`/`clearCustomRender`, `destroy`.

Terrain types: `GRASSLAND`, `PLAINS`, `DESERT`, `TUNDRA`, `SNOW`, `MOUNTAIN`, `OCEAN`, `COAST`.

## hex-math (`@vanduo-oss/hex-grid/hex-math`)
Pure helpers: `hexToPixel`, `pixelToHex`, `axialRound`, `rotatePoint`,
`unrotatePoint`, `getHexCorners`, `getAdjacentHexes`, `hexDistance`, `isPassable`,
`getMovementCost`, `getTerrainYields`, `getTerrainColor`; constants `TerrainType`,
`TERRAIN_COLORS`, `DEFAULT_TERRAIN_COLOR`, `TERRAIN_YIELDS`, `TERRAIN_MOVEMENT_COSTS`.

## Vue 3 (`@vanduo-oss/hex-grid/vue`)
```vue
<script setup>
import { VdHexGrid } from '@vanduo-oss/hex-grid/vue';
</script>
<template>
  <VdHexGrid :size="30" :width="15" :height="10" @select="onSelect" />
</template>
```
- Props: `size` (30), `width` (10), `height` (10), `rotation` (0).
- Emits `select`, `zoom`, `pan`, and `ready` (the grid instance, on mount).
- **SSR-safe**: the grid is created on mount; prop changes call the instance setters (no recreate).
- Exposes `{ getInstance() }` for the full imperative API.

## Version
`VD_HEX_VERSION` exposes the package version.
